info.title: Binance Kline Proxy for GPT
info.description: Provide Binance spot klines (historical and latest) for trading analysis.

servers.description: Public HTTPS endpoint that forwards to the local Node.js server.

get.description: Simple health check. Use this to verify the service is reachable before other calls.

get.summary: Get historical candlesticks from Binance spot
get.description: Fetch historical klines from Binance spot REST API. Use this when you need a window of past candles for analysis.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of candles to return. Max 1000.

get.summary: Get the latest spot kline (1 candle)
get.description: Get the latest single kline for a symbol/interval. Uses WebSocket cache when available for near-real-time data, with REST fallback.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT.
